'''ramate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pubically|pubically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pubically|pubically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ramate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ramate|ramate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ramatesher|ramatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ramatesherĂ«m|ramatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ramatero|ramatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ramateshĂ«|ramateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ramateshĂ«m|ramateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiramatero|gokiramatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiramateshĂ«|gokiramateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiramateshĂ«m|gokiramateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goramankerom|goramankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goramankeshĂ«|goramankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goramankeshĂ«m|goramankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goramankeya|goramankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ramaterom|ramaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ramatemu|ramatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ramateya|ramateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiramaterom|gokiramaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiramatemu|gokiramatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiramateya|gokiramateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ramamate|ramamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ramamatesher|ramamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ramamatesherĂ«m|ramamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ramamatero|ramamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ramamateshĂ«|ramamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ramamateshĂ«m|ramamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiramamatero|gokiramamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiramamateshĂ«|gokiramamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiramamateshĂ«m|gokiramamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goramamankerom|goramamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goramamankeshĂ«|goramamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goramamankeshĂ«m|goramamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goramamankeya|goramamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ramamaterom|ramamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ramamatemu|ramamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ramamateya|ramamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiramamaterom|gokiramamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiramamatemu|gokiramamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiramamateya|gokiramamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠmĂŠte|rĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠmĂŠtesher|rĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠmĂŠtero|rĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠmĂŠtero|gokirĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠmĂŠterom|rĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠmĂŠtemu|rĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠmĂŠteya|rĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠmĂŠterom|gokirĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠmĂŠteya|gokirĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafmafte|rafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafmaftesher|rafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafmaftesherĂ«m|rafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafmaftero|rafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafmafteshĂ«|rafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafmafteshĂ«m|rafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafmaftero|gokirafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafmafteshĂ«|gokirafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafmafteshĂ«m|gokirafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafmafnkerom|gorafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafmafnkeshĂ«|gorafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafmafnkeshĂ«m|gorafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafmafnkeya|gorafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafmafterom|rafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafmaftemu|rafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafmafteya|rafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafmafterom|gokirafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafmaftemu|gokirafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafmafteya|gokirafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
